creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
See build failure:

http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-amd64-default/p11c06749049e_s1c64959bff/logs/py38-tensorflow-1.15.5_2.log

ld: error: undefined symbol: absl::lts_20210324::Mutex::~Mutex()

There are similar issues elsewhere and the issue seems to be with grpc:

https://bugs.gentoo.org/817212

https://gitweb.gentoo.org/repo/gentoo.git/commit/?id=7a8b5d3587585121d92565980520507e9eb6e37d

Confirmed that downgrading grpc to 1.38 locally avoids the issue.
